specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: intel i5-11600K /AMD Ryzen 5 5600x
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA RTX 2070 / AMD RX 6600 /5700 8GB VRAM
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 12 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
  • VR Support: OpenXR Compatible VR Headsets
  • Additional Notes: 📌 VR Graphics & Performance – Important Note This game is designed as a scalable PC VR experience. Visual quality and performance depend on two combined factors: • Your VR streaming settings (Virtual Desktop, Air Link, SteamVR resolution) • The in-game graphics preset (Low / Medium / High) The in-game presets adjust visual quality within the current streaming resolution. This means that higher streaming quality with Medium in-game settings may look better than lower streaming quality with High settings. This behavior is normal for PC VR and allows the game to run smoothly across a wide range of hardware configurations. For the best experience, we recommend balancing both streaming quality and in-game settings according to your PC and network performance.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:

  • OS: windows 10 (64-bit)

  • Graphics: NVIDIA RTX 3080 10GB / AMD RX 6800 16 GB
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 12 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
  • VR Support: OpenXR Compatible VR Headsets
  • Additional Notes: 🔹 Simple example : If your VR streaming quality (Virtual Desktop / Air Link / SteamVR resolution) is set to Low, the game will render at a lower resolution. In this case, even setting the in-game graphics to High will not result in sharp visuals. On the other hand, a higher streaming quality combined with Medium in-game settings can look significantly better. This is expected behavior in PC VR.
